- Action model: Clicking buttons at (45, col) did not move the block. I will try clicking the "caps" at (42, col).

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
def get_yellow_objects(frame):
    yellows = []
    for node in frame.segmentation['nodes']:
        if node['color'] == 'Y':
            rows = [p[0] for p in node['boundary']]
            cols = [p[1] for p in node['boundary']]
            yellows.append({
                'id': node['id'],
                'pixels': node['pixels'],
                'center': (sum(rows)//len(rows), sum(cols)//len(cols)),
                'boundary': node['boundary']
            })
    return yellows

prev_yellows = get_yellow_objects(previous_frame)
curr_yellows = get_yellow_objects(current_frame)

print(f"Previous yellows: {prev_yellows}")
print(f"Current yellows: {curr_yellows}")

# Let's try clicking the blue circle again.
# I'll search for any object with color 'S' or any object in the bottom area.
blue_circle_pos = None
for node in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if node['color'] == 'S':
        rows = [p[0] for p in node['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in node['boundary']]
        blue_circle_pos = (sum(rows)//len(rows), sum(cols)//len(cols))
        break

if blue_circle_pos:
    print(f"Found blue circle at {blue_circle_pos}")
    action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': blue_circle_pos[0], 'col': blue_circle_pos[1]}])
else:
    # If not found by color 'S', look for an object at the very bottom (row > 50)
    for node in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
        rows = [p[0] for p in node['boundary']]
        if any(r > 50 for r in rows):
            rows = [p[0] for p in node['boundary']]
            cols = [p[1] for p in node['boundary']]
            blue_circle_pos = (sum(rows)//len(rows), sum(cols)//len(cols))
            print(f"Found object at bottom at {blue_circle_pos}")
            action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': blue_circle_pos[0], 'col': blue_circle_pos[1]}])
            break
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
